zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III於1255年出生在法國奧維可勒爾蒙特時，他的父親Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II17歲，母親Mathilde d'Auvergne26歲。他於1279年與Alixente de Mercoeur結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1324年1月27日享年69歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III于1255年出生在法国奧維可勒爾蒙特时，他的父亲Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II17岁，母亲Mathilde d'Auvergne26岁。他于1279年与Alixente de Mercoeur结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1324年1月27日享年69岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dauphin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Andre, Armand, Emile, Antoine, Benoit, Carmelle, Fernand, Georges, Jean Claude, Laure, Luckner, Maryse.

French and Haitian: from the French personal name Dauphin, from Latin Delphinus, derived from Greek delphis ‘dolphin’. This name was borne by a 4th-century Christian saint who was bishop of Bordeaux, and from the early 12th century it was in use as a hereditary personal name in the family of the counts of Albon, so that it soon came to be used as a title and led to their territory (capital Grenoble) being known as the Dauphiné. When it became part of the Kingdom of France in 1349, the title of dauphin thereafter denoted the heir-apparent to the throne, and it is possible that in some cases this is the origin of the surname, either denoting a member of the Dauphin's household or applied as a nickname in the sense of ‘prince’.

variants.name: Dauphine
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Aurelien.
French (Dauphiné): habitational name from the Dauphiné region of southeastern France (see Dauphin ).

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III was born in 1255, in Clermont, Auvergne, France, his father, Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II, was 17 and his mother, Mathilde d'Auvergne, was 26. He married Alixente de Mercoeur in 1279. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 27 January 1324, at the age of 69.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III est né en 1255, à Clermont, Auvergne, France, son père, Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II, avait 17 ans et sa mère, Mathilde d'Auvergne, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Alixente de Mercoeur en 1279. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 27 janvier 1324, à l’âge de 69 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III 1255 in Clermont, Auvergne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II 17 und seine Mutter Mathilde d'Auvergne 26. Er hat 1279 Alixente de Mercoeur geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 27. Januar 1324 im Alter von 69 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III è nato il nel 1255 nel Clermont, Auvergne, Francia, il suo padre, Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II, aveva 17 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde d'Auvergne, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Alixente de Mercoeur nel 1279. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 27 gennaio 1324, all'età di 69 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne IIIが1255年にフランスアウバーグンクラーモントで生まれた時，父Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne IIは17歳，母Mathilde d'Auvergneは26歳であった。1279年にAlixente de Mercoeurと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1324年1月27日に69歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III(이)가 1255년 프랑스 오버그니 클레몽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II(은)는 17세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde d'Auvergne(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1279년 Alixente de Mercoeur(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1324년 1월 27일 69세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III nasceu em 1255, em Clermont, Auvergne, França, seu pai, Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II, tinha 17 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde d'Auvergne, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Alixente de Mercoeur em 1279. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 27 de janeiro de 1324, com 69 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III родился в 1255 г. в местности клирмонт, аувиргн, Франция, его отцу по имени Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde d'Auvergne, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Alixente de Mercoeur в 1279 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 27 января 1324 г. в возрасте 69 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Robert Dauphin de Clermont-d'Auvergne III nació en 1255, en Clermont, Auvergne, Francia, su papá, Dauphin Robert de Clermont-d'Auvergne II, tenía 17 años y su mamá, Mathilde d'Auvergne, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Alixente de Mercoeur en 1279. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 27 de enero de 1324, a la edad de 69 años.
